title: Tubular Chrome Stacking Chair

title: Black Leather Tuxedo Sofa
description: Low three-seat tuxedo sofa, cracked-in black leather. Reads green room, hotel lobby, or after-hours. A workhorse hero piece.

description: Standard 6-foot folding banquet table. The backbone of any catering line, check-in desk, or crew table. Held deep.
